mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate above 8.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in industrial production and rise in manufacturing inventories signals weak supply chain dynamics, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive when both INDPRO and HOUST decline by > 2% sequentially.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly expansion in real GDP (GDPC1) above 3% combined with rising consumer spending (RSAFS) indicates strong demand momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain negative when both GDPC1 and RSAFS grow by > 2% sequentially.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in the CPI inflation rate above 2.5% signals central bank tightening pressure, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite CPI acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) below 50k combined with rising unemployment (UNRATE) signals labor market weakness, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive when both PAYEMS < 50k and UNRATE > 8.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly contraction in housing starts (HOUST) below 500k indicates weak demand for construction, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive when HOUST < 500k.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in industrial production (INDPRO) above 1.5% combined with falling capacity utilization signals strong supply-side growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain negative when INDPRO grows by > 1.5% sequentially.
